title: Belgium vs Iran Predicted Lineups — World Cup 2026 | TipsGG | Tips.GG

Belgium and Iran meet on Sunday, June 21, 2026 at 15:00 in a World Cup 2026 group stage fixture. Both sides come in off draws from their opening matchday, making this a critical three-pointer for each camp.

Belgium Predicted Lineup
Belgium drew 1–1 with Egypt on June 15. Thibaut Courtois starts in goal behind a back four of Thomas Meunier, Nathan Ngoy, Brandon Mechele, and Timothy Castagne, who picked up a yellow card in the 14th minute before being substituted in the 56th.
The midfield is anchored by Amadou Mvom Onana and Youri Tielemans, with Leandro Trossard operating in a more advanced role. Kevin De Bruyne and Jeremy Doku are named in the starting XI, both replaced in the 86th minute, while C. De Ketelaere came off at 66.

Iran Predicted Lineup
Iran drew 2–2 with New Zealand on June 15. Alireza Beiranvand keeps his place in goal. The back four lines up as Ramin Rezaeian, who scored in the 32nd minute, Shoja Khalilzadeh, Ali Nemati, and Milad Mohammadi.
In midfield, Saeid Ezatolahi provides the defensive screen alongside Mohammad Mohebi, the second Iran scorer who found the net in the 64th minute. Saman Ghoddos and Aria Yousefi were both replaced in the second half, at 65′ and 46′ respectively. Shahriar Moghanlou came off at 53′. Mehdi Taremi leads the attack and was substituted in the 80th minute.
